Metadata.title: TrustLens | Spot Hidden Subscriptions & TOS Traps with AI
Metadata.description: An AI Chrome extension that instantly audits Terms of Service. Protect your money, your data, and your copyright before you click "Accept".

Hero.title_start: You already got burned by a hidden subscription once.
Hero.description: Stop losing money to sketchy "free trials" and shady web tools. TrustLens AI spots impossible auto-renewals, copyright traps, and data brokers before you click "Accept".
Hero.cta_primary: Stop getting scammed — Join the waitlist 🛡️
Hero.footer: Works with policies from Generative AI, PDF Compressors, and new SaaS platforms.

WhyItMatters.title:
Terms of Service are broken.

We fix them.
WhyItMatters.problem_desc: You needed a quick tool, clicked 'Accept' in a rush, and two weeks later you're fighting a charge or finding your data on a spam list. This is about not getting taken advantage of again.
WhyItMatters.solution_desc: TrustLens scans for three specific threats: Financial Traps (hidden subscriptions), IP Theft (abusive AI copyright clauses), and Data Brokers who sell your personal info.

ProductDemo.title:
See the real risks.

Before you click accept.
ProductDemo.description: Our AI scans thousands of words of legal text to highlight the clauses that matter most.

ui.risk_1_desc: Your browsing history and personal details can be sold to advertisers.
ui.risk_2_desc: You waive your right to sue the company in court or join a class action.
ui.risk_3_desc: They can charge your card indefinitely without prior notice.

HowItWorks.title: Three steps to clearer terms
HowItWorks.step_2_desc: Open the extension when you sign up or checkout.
HowItWorks.step_3_desc: Instantly view a simplified summary of the most important legal clauses.

ExampleAnalysis.title:
Shield your money and

professional work.
ExampleAnalysis.description: New AI tools and random SaaS often hide clauses that claim ownership of your work or lock you into expensive subscriptions. TrustLens surfaces these traps instantly.
ExampleAnalysis.quote: "We surface the risks, so you make informed choices without needing a law degree."

ui.concern_1_desc: Platform demands perpetual and royalty-free rights to any content you generate or upload.
ui.concern_2_desc: Subsequent billing cycles trigger automatically with high barriers to cancellation.
ui.concern_3_desc: Your personal identifiers are shared with third-party brokers for marketing purposes.

ComingSoon.title: What TrustLens prevents you from stepping into:
ComingSoon.description: Most tools hide these clauses in thousands of words of legal jargon. We highlight them in seconds.
ComingSoon.feature_1_desc: That $29/mo charge from a tool you used once, where the cancel button is magically missing.
ComingSoon.feature_2_desc: That free AI image generator that subtly claims a perpetual license over everything you upload.
ComingSoon.feature_3_desc: That random PDF compressor that makes its real money selling your email to 50 data brokers.

FAQ.title: Frequently asked questions
FAQ.q1: Do you collect or sell my browsing data?
FAQ.a1: No. TrustLens is designed with privacy-first principles. The extension only reads the Terms of Service pages you visit, and we never collect, store, or sell your personal browsing history.
FAQ.a2: Yes, our core scanning and summarization features are entirely free during our Early Access phase. In the future, we may introduce advanced premium features, but basic transparency will always be accessible.
FAQ.a3: TrustLens is currently being built for Google Chrome (and other Chromium-based browsers like Brave, Edge, and Arc). We plan to add native support for Firefox and Safari shortly after launch.
FAQ.q4: How accurate is the AI scanner?
FAQ.a4: We use state-of-the-art AI models, combined with highly specialized legal prompts, to extract and flag common hidden clauses with high accuracy. However, TrustLens is designed to assist you in understanding complex terms quickly, not to replace formal legal advice.

Waitlist.title: Stop guessing. Start knowing.
Waitlist.description: Join the waitlist to be among the first to try TrustLens.
Waitlist.disclaimer: No spam, ever. Unsubscribe at any time.
Waitlist.success_desc: Check your inbox for a quick question. (Psst... if you don't see it, check your Promotions or Spam folder and drag it to your Primary inbox so you don't miss your early access link).

Footer.disclaimer: Disclaimer: TrustLens provides automated summaries of public terms of service and privacy policies. Results are generated using AI and may not reflect the full legal meaning of the document.
Footer.modal_desc: We only collect your email to notify you of our launch. We use Supabase to store it securely. We will never sell it or track your browsing. That's it.
